stats.label: Crafted
stats.note: 8 gold blocks + 1 apple produce one enchanted apple.

stats.label: Effects
stats.note: Regeneration V, Absorption IV, Resistance I, Fire Resistance I are applied.

description.tagline: Craft enchanted golden apples with 8 gold blocks + 1 apple, restoring 1.8.9 effects: Regeneration V, Absorption IV, Resistance I, Fire Resistance I.
description.title: Old Notch Apples
